titleStmt.title: SII 11.36: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 36. (B.K. No. 175 of 1926-27). RŌṆ, ROṆ TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A HERO-STONE LYING IN THE TALUK OFFICE.

summary.p: The record refers itself to the reign of Kannaradēva (i.e., Kṛishṇa III), and introduces his brother-in-law (bhāva) Mahāmaṇḍalika Permāḍi Būtārya as governing the Gaṅgavāḍi Ninety-six Thousand, Beḷvola Three Hundred and Puligeṟe Three Hundred provinces in Śaka 864 corresponding to the cyclic year Śubhakṛit. It commemorates the death of one Paṁpayya of the Vāji family and the [K]auṇḍilya (Kauṇḍinya)gōtra in a fight with Būtayya-Permāḍi who had attacked Rōṇa on Sunday the 6th day of the bright half of Vaiśākha (= 24th April A.D. 942).

It is worth noting that Būtārya, i.e., the Western Gaṅga prince Būtuga II was already in possession of Beḷvola Three Hundred and Purigeṟe Three Hundred in A.D. 942, although it is stated in the Ātakūr inscription (Ep. Ind. Vol. VI, p. 50) that these provinces were given to him by Kṛishṇa III in A.D. 949-50 in recognition of his having killed the Chōḷa prince Rājāditya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti . samastabhuvanāśrayaśrī prithuvīvallabhaṁ māhārājāIt must be noticed that this introduction resembles closely
dhirājā paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka śrīmat kannaradēvana rā
jyōdayā kāladoḷ kannaradēvana bhāvaṁ mahāmaṇḍalika permmā
ḍi būtāryyaṁ gaṅgavāḍi toṁbhattaṟu sāsiraṁ beḷvola mūnūṟuma (nāḷu)

puligeṟe mūnūṟuma nāḷuttire [.] svasti sakanripakāḷākrānta saṁvatsaraṅga 864 ne
subhakritsaṁvatsaraṁ pravarttise tadvarṣābhyantarada vaiśākasuddha 6 ĀdityavāradanduThe figure appears to be a correction
kaṇamaṁ perōhiyaṁ bha tāyamanīyavēḻkumendu kiḍisidāgaḷa paṁpayyaṁ
nānondakṣateyanappaṁda mi yenendu taṟisalā mā(ṁ)nyadiṭṭha mahājanamaṁ nama
skāraṁge
ydu rā
jābhi
mukha(ṁ)
nāgiḻdu
kaṭṭida
poḻala
lage kkī
®ke

vritta . taṟesandeṁmoḍe rōṇamaṁ kiḍisitā būtāryya permāḍi
rvva ṟisuttiṟdoḍe tanna nandiṟidu mēṇutsāhadiṁ rōṇamaṇniṟe kādu
vettusatta nadhikaṁ paṁpayya nuddāmasad guṟukaṁ vājikuḷō
dayaṁ budhanutaṁ koṇḍillyagōtrōnnatam [.] kanda . dhareyellaṁ pogaḻvantire
purigeṟeyoḷagurtu rōṇamaṁ kādamarēśvara puramaneydidōṁ pesariṁ kīrtti
śrīpatāka nabhinutaṁ paṁpayyaṁ . Intu rōṇa kādu satture suralō
kaṁ praptanādon .
Digital edition of SII 11.36 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
